title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Grofers Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Category Manager at Grofers Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Grofers Advisory Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About Grofers Advisory Limited:
Grofers Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Grofers Advisory Limited!
